heading: Separability of 1936 amendment
label: 17a Separability of 1936 amendment
text: If any provision of the , , which amends this chapter, or the application thereof to any person or circumstances is held invalid, the provisions of the section of this chapter which is amended by such provision of said act shall apply to such person or circumstances. No proceeding shall be abated by reason of any amendment to this chapter made by said act but shall be disposed of pursuant to said act.act of June 15, 1936, ch. 54549 Stat. 1491
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Commodity Exchange Act which comprises this chapter.
Effective DateFor effective date of section, see section 13 of act , set out as an Effective Date of 1936 Amendment note under .June 15, 1936section 1 of this title
